case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$2467.U.S.CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$2467.U.S.CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NTC OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-27-2007 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. CLAIMANT IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS
POS OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1233.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY BRENDAB CONROY ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT BRANDON HOLLIS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1234.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Docs
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
